chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No. 1970 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 24th December, 2021 Mr. Saeed-ur-Rehman, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, APG a/w ASI Habib-ur-Rehman. ============= Omar Sial, J: Suleman Khan has sought pre-arrest bail in crime number 711 of 2021 registered under section 320 P.P.C. at the Aziz Bhatti police station in Karachi. Earlier, his application seeking bail was dismissed by the learned 10th Additional Sessions Judge, Karachi East on 15-9-2021. 2. Facts of the case are that the aforementioned F.I.R. was lodged by Syed Ashar Ahmed on 11-7-2021 reporting an offence which had occurred earlier that day. He recorded that he received information that his father had been injured in a road accident in which a bus had hit him and the driver had run away. Unfortunately his father succumbed to his injuries. 3. I have heard the learned counsel for the applicant as well as the Assistant Prosecutor General. The complainant did not effect an appearance in spite of notice. 4. An offence under section 320 P.P.C. is a bailable offence and bail should have been granted to the applicant as of right. 5. Above are the reasons for my short order of 22-11-2021. JUDGE
